cloud_function.description: Specifies the Cloud Function for which IAM policy bindings will be managed, requiring the resource name in the format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/functions/{function_name}`.

condition.description: Defines an optional IAM condition that must be met for the policy binding to apply, including its expression, title, and description.

location.description: Specifies the Google Cloud region where the Cloud Function and IAM policy binding should be applied.

member.description: Specifies the IAM identity to grant the role to, such as a user, service account, or group.

role.description: Defines the IAM role to be assigned to the member for the specified Cloud Function, such as "roles/cloudfunctions.invoker".
